title: Building Blocks for Foundation Model Training and Inference on AWS
summary: 本文介绍了在AWS上训练和部署基础模型（Foundation Models）的核心构建模块，包括计算实例（如GPU实例）、存储方案（如Amazon FSx）、网络优化（如EFA）以及推理优化技术（如模型并行和量化）。文章还讨论了使用Amazon SageMaker和Amazon Bedrock等托管服务来简化工作流程，并提供了最佳实践和架构建议。
highlights: AWS provides a range of GPU instances like p4d and p5 for foundation model training.
Amazon FSx for Lustre offers high-performance storage for large-scale training data.
Elastic Fabric Adapter (EFA) enables low-latency communication between nodes.
Model parallelism and quantization are key techniques for efficient inference.
Amazon SageMaker and Bedrock simplify the end-to-end ML workflow.
